messages.content: I have a training on AlManhal resource and I need to send training outcome and objective for the customer

Dear [Customer],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to provide you with an overview of the training session on AlManhal resource that was conducted recently. This training aimed to enhance your staff's understanding and utilization of the AlManhal resource, ultimately leading to improved productivity and efficiency in your organization.

Training Objective:
The primary objective of the training was to familiarize your staff with the features and functionalities of AlManhal, enabling them to effectively search, access, and utilize the vast collection of Arab language academic and scholarly resources available on the platform. By the end of the training, participants were expected to achieve the following learning outcomes:

Training Outcome:

1. Understanding AlManhal Resource: Participants gained a comprehensive understanding of the AlManhal resource, including its scope, key features, and the wide range of academic publications available in Arabic.

2. Efficient Search Techniques: Participants learned advanced search techniques and strategies to effectively locate relevant information and resources within the AlManhal platform, ensuring faster and more accurate research outcomes.

3. Access and Navigation: Participants gained practical knowledge on accessing and navigating the AlManhal resource, enabling them to efficiently explore the various resources available, such as journals, books, theses, and reports.

4. Citation and Referencing: Participants were trained on proper citation and referencing methods to ensure appropriate and accurate usage of content from AlManhal in their academic or professional work.

5. Enhanced Research Skills: Through the training, participants developed their research skills, enabling them to conduct comprehensive literature reviews and staying up-to-date with the latest publications in their respective fields of interest.

We are confident that this training session has equipped your staff with the necessary skills and knowledge to maximize the potential of AlManhal resource. The aim was to empower your organization's workforce with enhanced research and academic capabilities, ultimately leading to increased productivity and improved decision-making.

Should you have any inquiries or require further information, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Thank you for choosing our services, and we look forward to supporting your organization's continued success.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Organization]
I need the same text but for future instead past

Dear [Customer],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to provide you with an overview of the upcoming training session on AlManhal resource. This training aims to enhance your staff's understanding and utilization of the AlManhal resource, ultimately leading to improved productivity and efficiency in your organization.

Training Objective:
The primary objective of the training will be to familiarize your staff with the features and functionalities of AlManhal, enabling them to effectively search, access, and utilize the vast collection of Arab language academic and scholarly resources available on the platform. By the end of the training, participants are expected to achieve the following learning outcomes:

Training Outcome:

1. Understanding AlManhal Resource: Participants will gain a comprehensive understanding of the AlManhal resource, including its scope, key features, and the wide range of academic publications available in Arabic.

2. Efficient Search Techniques: Participants will learn advanced search techniques and strategies to effectively locate relevant information and resources within the AlManhal platform, ensuring faster and more accurate research outcomes.

3. Access and Navigation: Participants will gain practical knowledge on accessing and navigating the AlManhal resource, enabling them to efficiently explore the various resources available, such as journals, books, theses, and reports.

4. Citation and Referencing: Participants will be trained on proper citation and referencing methods to ensure appropriate and accurate usage of content from AlManhal in their academic or professional work.

5. Enhanced Research Skills: Through the training, participants will develop their research skills, enabling them to conduct comprehensive literature reviews and stay up-to-date with the latest publications in their respective fields of interest.

We are confident that this training session will equip your staff with the necessary skills and knowledge to maximize the potential of AlManhal resource. Our aim is to empower your organization's workforce with enhanced research and academic capabilities, ultimately leading to increased productivity and improved decision-making.

Should you have any inquiries or require further information, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. We are looking forward to conducting this training session and supporting your organization's continued success.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Organization]
paraphrase Through the training, participants will develop their research skills and stay up-to-date with the latest publications in their respective fields of interest.
During the training, participants will have the opportunity to enhance their research skills and remain informed about the most recent publications relevant to their particular areas of interest.
paraphrase Confirmed Aug 22 at 2:30 pm Malaysia Time with the same meeting link
The training session has been scheduled for August 22nd at 2:30 pm Malaysia Time, and it will utilize the same meeting link as before.
The training session has been reconfirmed for August 22nd at 2:30 pm Malaysia Time, and the same meeting link will be used for the session.
paraphrase Sure, already requested from Amer, and I will share it with her with the next email
Certainly, I have already made a request to Amer and will share the requested information with her in the next email.

paraphrase While entering into a contract to commit to a 5-year subscription, the House of Wisdom Library will be entitled to keep the electronic books at the start of the subscription (their number is 17 thousand books) permanently after the end of the fifth year. Note that the subscription fee will be paid annually.

As part of the agreement to enter into a 5-year subscription, the House of Wisdom Library will have the right to retain the 17 thousand electronic books from the start of the subscription permanently after the conclusion of the fifth year. It is important to note that the subscription fee will be paid on an annual basis.

Please see the attached screenshot displaying the error.
paraphrase The user must be logged in to be considered active, this means there is 98 user never login to MENATE
In order to be classified as active, users must be logged in. Consequently, there are 98 users who have never logged into MENATE.
